ogTitle: Silverwater vs Simpkins Creek: Climate Safety

heading: Silverwater vs Simpkins Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Silverwater, New South Wales and Simpkins Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Silverwater and Simpkins Creek have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Silverwater or Simpkins Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Silverwater has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Simpkins Creek scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Silverwater scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Simpkins Creek scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Silverwater or Simpkins Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Silverwater has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
